_comment: Shared app catalog for JBTheatreTools. Both the macOS (SwiftUI) and Windows (WinForms) launchers bundle this file and resolve the per-OS/arch asset by exact name. Keep in sync with each tool's release asset names. Platform keys: macos, windows-x64, windows-arm64. macOS assets are .zip bundles containing a .app; Windows assets are self-contained single-file .exe.

apps.name: HeloControl
apps.blurb: Control AJA HELO stream / record encoders.

apps.name: Machine Inventory
apps.blurb: Collect hardware / software inventory from show machines.

apps.name: Cisco Switch Tools
apps.blurb: Back up & manage Cisco CBS350 / SG switches over SSH.

apps.name: CiscoBrotherLabels
apps.blurb: Generate Brother P-touch port labels from Cisco switch configs.
